hero.headline: Refer clients. Earn up to 40%. For life.
hero.subheadline: Join the Wtraders IB Program and turn every referral into a recurring revenue stream — paid daily.
hero.cta2: See How Much You Can Earn

keyBenefits.title: Built to maximize your earnings.
keyBenefits.subtitle: A partnership designed for serious affiliates who want transparent commissions, fast payouts, and long-term value.
keyBenefits.b1Desc: Earn a flat 40% of the company fee on every trade your referred clients place. No tiers, no caps, no surprises.
keyBenefits.b2Desc: Commissions are calculated and paid every business day after market close. No waiting weeks for your earnings.
keyBenefits.b3Desc: Once a client is yours, they're yours for life. Earn from their trading activity as long as they trade with us.
keyBenefits.b4Desc: Forex, indices, commodities, metals, energies, crypto — clients can trade everything, and you earn from all of it.

earningsCalculator.title: See what you could earn.
earningsCalculator.subtitle: Move the slider to see your estimated monthly earnings based on the number of active referred clients.
earningsCalculator.footnote: Estimate based on an average active referred client trading 15 standard lots per month at an indicative fee of $16/lot. Actual earnings vary based on instrument, spread, and client activity.

howItWorks.title: Start earning in four steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: From application to first payout, the process is fast and straightforward.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Sign up for the Wtraders IB Program in minutes. No upfront cost, no minimum requirements.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Access your unique referral link and marketing assets directly from your partner dashboard.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Share your link across your channels — website, social media, communities, email.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Get paid daily for every trade your referred clients make. Track everything in real time.

whyWtraders.title: A broker your clients can trust.
whyWtraders.subtitle: Send your audience to a multi-asset broker with the infrastructure and reputation to keep them trading — and keep you earning.
whyWtraders.r1Desc: Operating under regulatory oversight with transparent practices and segregated client funds.
whyWtraders.r2Desc: Forex, indices, commodities, metals, and crypto — all from a single account.
whyWtraders.r3Desc: Direct line to a partner manager who knows your business and helps you scale.
whyWtraders.r4Desc: Live dashboard with client activity, volume, commission, and payout history.

marketingTools.title: Everything you need to convert.
marketingTools.subtitle: Professionally designed assets and the infrastructure to track every click, signup, and trade.
marketingTools.t1Desc: Ready-to-use banners in multiple formats and languages, optimized for high conversion.
marketingTools.t2Desc: Custom referral links with full attribution — track sources, campaigns, and conversions.
marketingTools.t3Desc: Monitor referrals, lot volume, commissions, and payouts from one clean interface.
marketingTools.t4Desc: Integrate referral data into your own systems, CRM, or reporting tools via our API.

faq.title: Common questions.
faq.q1Question: How is the 40% revenue share calculated?
faq.q1Answer: You earn 40% of the company fee charged on every trade your referred clients place. For example, on 1 standard lot of EUR/USD where the company fee is $16, your share is $6.40.
faq.q2Question: When and how do I get paid?
faq.q2Answer: Commissions are calculated and credited to your account every business day after market close. Withdrawals are processed through the same methods available to traders — bank transfer, crypto, and e-wallets.
faq.q3Question: Are there any minimum requirements to join?
faq.q3Answer: No minimum traffic, audience size, or upfront investment required. The program is open to individuals, content creators, communities, and professional affiliates.
faq.q4Question: Do my referred clients need to deposit a minimum amount?
faq.q4Answer: Your referred clients follow the standard Wtraders account requirements. There is no additional deposit threshold for you to start earning from their activity.
faq.q5Question: How long do I earn from a referred client?
faq.q5Answer: For life. As long as your referred client continues to trade with Wtraders, you continue to earn from every trade they place.
faq.q6Answer: All tradable instruments — forex pairs, indices, commodities, metals, energies, and cryptocurrencies. You earn on every fee-generating trade across all asset classes.
faq.q7Question: How do I track my earnings?
faq.q7Answer: Your partner dashboard shows live data on referred clients, trading volume, commission per trade, and payout history. Full reporting is available 24/7.
faq.q8Question: Is there a cost to join the IB program?
faq.q8Answer: No. Registration is free, there are no monthly fees, and there are no targets you need to hit to remain active.

finalCta.title: Ready to start earning?
finalCta.subtitle: Join the Wtraders IB Program today. Free to register, daily payouts, lifetime commissions.

footer.tagline: The Wtraders IB Program — turn your network into recurring income.
footer.riskWarning: Trading forex and CFDs carries a high level of risk and may not be suitable for all investors. Leverage can work both for and against you. Before deciding to trade, you should carefully consider your investment objectives, level of experience, and risk appetite. There is a possibility that you could sustain a loss of some or all of your initial investment; therefore, you should not invest money you cannot afford to lose.
